function.name: str_replace
function.description: Replace a specific string in a file with new content. The oldStr must match EXACTLY one location in the file (including whitespace and indentation). Use this for surgical edits - it's safer than rewriting entire files. If the string is not found or matches multiple locations, the operation fails. PARALLEL EXECUTION: When performing multiple independent string replacements (in different files or non-overlapping sections), invoke str_replace multiple times in parallel rather than sequentially.

path.description: Path to the file to modify

oldStr.description: The exact string to find and replace. Must match exactly one location. Include enough context (2-3 lines) to make it unique.

newStr.description: The new string to replace oldStr with

commonErrors.solution: Search string does not match any content in file
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use view to examine file and verify exact text to match
Add more context lines to make search unique, or use grep first
Use find_files to locate the file
